title: Keep Inventory Perms
description: Adds a permission for keeping your inventory on death!
body:
# Replaced by https://modrinth.com/plugin/better-keep-inventory

# About 
Ever wanted to make it so only VIP members or only admins would keep their inventory on death? This plugin have a permission so certain people can keep their inventory on death!

Very lightweight

## Permissions
`keepinventoryperms.keepinv` - Allows a player to keep their inventory on death without setting the gamemode to true
